theme_and_archetype.rationale: Combines the frictionless, minimal cognitive load of macOS and Notion (Archetype 4: Swiss/High-Contrast) with the sharp precision and confidence of martial arts (Archetype 2: Performance Pro). Avoids generic SaaS 'AI-slop' by using stark monochromes, glassmorphism, and a disciplined, singular accent color.

buttons.primary: bg-primary_accent text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-[1px] transition-all duration-250 ease-mac_os focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary_accent/30 focus:outline-none
buttons.secondary: bg-surface_muted text-text_primary border border-border/50 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium hover:bg-border/30 transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-border
buttons.ghost: text-text_secondary hover:text-text_primary hover:bg-surface_muted rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

inputs.base: w-full rounded-lg border border-border bg-surface px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-text_primary placeholder-text_tertiary transition-all duration-250 focus:border-primary_accent focus:ring-4 focus:ring-primary_accent/10 focus:outline-none
inputs.label: block text-xs font-semibold tracking-wide text-text_secondary uppercase mb-1.5

cards.standard: bg-surface rounded-xl border border-border shadow-ambient p-6
cards.glass: bg-glass_bg backdrop-blur-xl backdrop-saturate-150 rounded-xl border border-white/20 (dark:border-white/10) shadow-ambient

tables_and_queues.header: sticky top-0 bg-surface_muted/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-border text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-text_secondary py-3 px-4 z-10

component_guidelines.status_pills: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium tracking-wide shadow-sm backdrop-blur-sm

public_registration.layout: Centered maximum-width container (max-w-3xl) with ample vertical breathing room (py-24). Form broken into logical macroscopic steps (Club Info, Fighter Details, Medical) using subtle horizontal dividers or smooth scroll sections.
public_registration.visuals: Hero section utilizes 'hero_background_editorial' with a heavy black/50 overlay and a glassmorphism container for the form to sit on, evoking a premium app-like entry.

admin_review_queue.layout: Full-width dashboard (macOS Finder style). Top bar contains search, filters (weight class, status, club), and bulk-action triggers. Main area is a dense, high-contrast table view optimized for scanning.
admin_review_queue.visuals: Use sticky headers with glassmorphism. Empty states should feature minimalist icons and muted typography.

reviewer_workbench.layout: Split-pane layout (Notion/macOS Mail style). Left sidebar (30% width) contains a scrollable list of applicants in the queue. Right main pane (70% width) displays the selected applicant's full detail view, timeline, and sticky action footer (Approve/Reject/Correction).
reviewer_workbench.visuals: Sidebar items should have clear active states (e.g., bg-surface_muted with a primary_accent left border). Detail view should use a Bento-grid style layout for quick scanning of Medical, Weight, and Record.

club_dashboard.layout: Grid-based overview (Bento grid). Top row: key metrics (Drafts, Needs Correction, Approved). Main area: Tabs separating 'Roster' and 'Correction Inbox'.
club_dashboard.visuals: Focus on high legibility and clear status indicators.

interaction_specs.validation_behavior: Inline, real-time validation. Error messages appear below inputs in text-red-500 text-xs with a subtle slide-down animation.
interaction_specs.correction_window: When admin requests correction, a slide-out drawer (macOS style side-sheet) appears to input the exact reason. Sends applicant a highlighted view of the specific fields to fix.
interaction_specs.bulk_actions: Selecting multiple queue rows reveals a floating action bar (glassmorphic) at the bottom center of the viewport, with options to bulk approve or request medical re-checks.
interaction_specs.accessibility: All inputs MUST have focus rings (focus:ring-2). Ensure APCA contrast compliance, especially for dark mode text-secondary on surface_muted backgrounds.

hero_background_editorial.description: Abstract, high-end editorial photography of a martial arts dojo at golden hour.
hero_background_editorial.usage: Use as full-screen background for public registration page with a dark overlay, or as a subtle textured background in the login screen.

dark_mode_texture.description: Macro photography of black belt martial arts texture.
dark_mode_texture.usage: Use for dark-mode specific empty states, sidebars, or modal backgrounds as a faint overlay.

avatar_placeholder_1.description: A man standing in the dark with his hands in his pockets.
avatar_placeholder_1.usage: Applicant profile picture placeholder in mock data.

avatar_placeholder_2.description: Black and white portrait of a martial artist in a Gi with confident pose.
avatar_placeholder_2.usage: Applicant profile picture placeholder in mock data.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color tokens: rely heavily on monochrome layers (surface, surface_muted) and use the primary accent (#E5484D) solely for primary CTAs and critical states.
Implement light and dark mode toggling utilizing Tailwind's 'dark:' variant class structure.
For Shadcn components, override default padding and borders to match the 'spacing_and_layout' guidelines (e.g., rounded-xl for cards, glassmorphic headers).
Do NOT use HTML generic <select> or <input type='date'>. Use Shadcn Dropdown, Select, and Calendar.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Use Lucide-React or Phosphor Icons for sharp, thin-stroke iconography (avoid heavy/filled icons unless active).
For the Review Workbench, use a flex layout with h-screen to ensure the left sidebar scrolls independently of the right content pane.
Never use placeholder URLs (like via.placeholder.com). Use the provided image URLs in the 'media' object.
